title: RegulationClause entity (ONT-E-07)
description: A specific clause within a regulation (e.g. FAR §25.1309, EASA CS 25.1329, CAAC CCAR-25.1309, AMC 25.1309). Includes supersession chain support per Pitfall #6 (status enum + superseded_by URI). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref. Jurisdiction enum is canonical per ontology/vocabularies/jurisdictions.yaml (Plan 10). Pitfall #1 lock: unevaluatedProperties: false. Pitfall #9 lock: $schema = JSON Schema Draft 2020-12. Phase 3 validator enforces conditional: status == 'superseded' → superseded_by required. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. Locked to 'RegulationClause' for this entity type.

jurisdiction.description: Issuing jurisdiction. Canonical labels per ontology/vocabularies/jurisdictions.yaml (Plan 10). Example: 'FAA' for FAR §25.1309, 'EASA' for CS 25.1329, 'CAAC' for CCAR-25.1309.

document.description: URI of the parent Document entity that holds the regulation (the containing FAR Part / CS Book / CCAR / ICAO Annex).

clause_id.description: Clause identifier within the document. Example: '25.1309', 'AMC 25.1309', 'CCAR-25.1309(b)(1)'.

effective_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this clause version takes effect.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Pitfall #6 supersession chain: 'superseded' clauses MUST set superseded_by; 'withdrawn' clauses are no longer cited even by superseded chain; 'draft' clauses are NPRM/proposed text and MUST NOT be cited as authority. Phase 3 validator enforces conditional supersession-chain integrity.

superseded_by.description: URI of the active replacement RegulationClause. REQUIRED (Phase 3 validator) when status == 'superseded'. Forms the supersession chain that lets a citation walk forward to the currently effective clause.

full_text_zh.description: Optional canonical clause text in Chinese (when available). The base i18n.label and i18n.full_text fields cover bilingual labels and free-form bilingual content; full_text_zh / full_text_en are the verbatim regulation text where official translations exist.

full_text_en.description: Optional canonical clause text in English.
